headline: Lucid Investor Day Highlights Robotaxi Ambitions And Path To Scale
summary: Lucid Group (NasdaqGS:LCID) has scheduled an Investor Day to outline its plan to move from an early stage EV maker toward a more profitable business model. The company will also host a fireside chat with Uber's President and COO focused on a next generation robotaxi partnership. Together, these events are expected to highlight Lucid's approach to commercial partnerships and autonomous mobility opportunities beyond its current retail-focused lineup. headline: Uber Stock Jumps After Striking Partnership With Amazon's Robotaxi Business Zoox
summary: Amazon-owned Zoox has reached a partnership to offer its robotaxis on Uber Technologies' app, the companies announced Wednesday.  The arrangement will bring Zoox's boxy autonomous cabs to the Uber app in Las Vegas this summer and in Los Angeles by the middle of next year, according to a news release.  Uber riders can be matched with a Zoox robotaxi on eligible trips, though Zoox will also keep offering service through its Zoox app.

content.title: Uber Stock Jumps After Striking Partnership With Amazon's Robotaxi Business Zoox
content.summary: Amazon-owned Zoox has reached a partnership to offer its robotaxis on Uber Technologies' app, the companies announced Wednesday.  The arrangement will bring Zoox's boxy autonomous cabs to the Uber app in Las Vegas this summer and in Los Angeles by the middle of next year, according to a news release.  Uber riders can be matched with a Zoox robotaxi on eligible trips, though Zoox will also keep offering service through its Zoox app.

headline: Zoox and Uber tie up to deploy robotaxis on ride-hailing network
summary: Uber Technologies signed a multi-year partnership to deploy Zoox's purpose-built robotaxis to its platform, the companies ‌said on Wednesday, marking the latter's first venture with ‌a third-party ride-hailing service.  Despite lagging behind industry leader Alphabet's Waymo in robotaxi deployment, Zoox ​has been gradually expanding operations, launching limited services in Las Vegas and a pilot rider program in San Francisco late last year.  Zoox said on Monday it will expand testing to Dallas and Phoenix, ‌along with launching a ⁠command hub for fleet operations in Arizona.

content.title: Zoox and Uber tie up to deploy robotaxis on ride-hailing network
content.summary: Uber Technologies signed a multi-year partnership to deploy Zoox's purpose-built robotaxis to its platform, the companies ‌said on Wednesday, marking the latter's first venture with ‌a third-party ride-hailing service.  Despite lagging behind industry leader Alphabet's Waymo in robotaxi deployment, Zoox ​has been gradually expanding operations, launching limited services in Las Vegas and a pilot rider program in San Francisco late last year.  Zoox said on Monday it will expand testing to Dallas and Phoenix, ‌along with launching a ⁠command hub for fleet operations in Arizona.

headline: This Physical AI Stock Jumped on Earnings. The Robots Are Coming.
summary: Shares of  Serve Robotics  jumped after the company reported better-than-expected financial results and provided solid sales guidance for 2026.  Wednesday morning, Serve reported fourth-quarter revenue of $900,000, beating the $800,000 Wall Street expected.  Serve, which builds AI-trained autonomous delivery robots, is still small, scaling production and operations.
